description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gnar/gear-ci-base:1.0 Docker image and defines a single stage called test. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `pip3 install --upgrade pip setuptools tox codecov`, then executes `tox`, and finally uploads coverage with `codecov --token=e8bcce36-b0de-494e-b7a1-9cd4926299f9`. The pipeline has no additional services, caches, artifacts, or rules.
